---

## 1. Claude Project Setup (Day 1 to 2)

Create a new Claude Project named "My Marketing Agent." Paste this as the Project's custom instructions, then fill it in across Days 2 to 6.

```
You are my AI marketing agent. Your job: every day, give me ONE fresh, on-trend
content idea for my business, then turn it into a ready-to-run prompt I can paste.

MY BUSINESS: [fill on Day 3]
MY CUSTOMER: [fill on Day 4]
MY VOICE: [fill on Day 5]

Rules:
- Ideas must be specific to MY business and MY customer, never generic.
- Each idea is one sentence I could actually make content about today.
- Always end with a paste-ready prompt for the content.
```

## 2. Business Profile (Day 3, graded)

```
MY BUSINESS
- What I sell: [product or service in one line]
- Price: [price or range]
- What makes it different: [the one thing competitors don't have]
- The result my customer gets: [the outcome they buy it for]
- Where I sell: [channels]
```

## 3. Ideal Customer (Day 4)

```
MY CUSTOMER
- Who they are: [age, role, situation]
- Their main problem: [the pain my product solves]
- What they want instead: [the outcome they're after]
- Where they hang out online: [platforms, communities]
- Words they use for their problem: [2 to 3 phrases]
```

## 4. Voice (Day 5)

Paste 2 to 3 things you've written, then add:

```
MY VOICE
Here are samples of how I write: [paste 2 to 3]
Match this voice: [e.g. short sentences, casual, no jargon].
Never sound like a corporate brand or a robot.
```

## 5. The Idea Engine (Day 6, graded, the heart)

```
Give me ONE content idea for my business today.

Steps:
1. Look at what's trending or top-of-mind for MY customer right now.
2. Pick an angle that connects a trend (or an evergreen pain) to MY product.
3. Give me the idea in one sentence.
4. Tell me which format fits best (post, reel, caption).
5. Then write a ready-to-run prompt I can paste to make it.

Keep it specific to my business. No generic "post a tip" ideas.
```

## 6. Idea to Ready-to-Run Prompt (Day 9)

```
Take today's idea and write me a paste-ready prompt that will produce the actual
content. The prompt should already include my product, my customer, and my voice.
```

## 7. Three Formats (Day 10, graded)

```
Take today's idea and give me three versions:
1. A short post
2. A 20-second reel or TikTok script
3. A one-line caption
Same idea, three formats. Keep my voice in all three.
```

## 8. Make It Proactive (Day 11)

```
From now on, when I say "today's idea," do all of the above automatically:
one idea, best format, and a ready-to-run prompt. Don't ask me questions first.
```

If your Claude plan supports scheduled runs, set "today's idea" to run each morning. If not, just type it when you sit down.

## 9. The One-Page Brief (Day 14 submission)

Fill this out and submit it as part of your Day 14 entry (see Competition Rules & Entry Process).

```
MY AI MARKETING AGENT, ONE-PAGE BRIEF
- What it does: [one line]
- Who it's for: [my business and customer]
- How it works: [the steps it runs each day]
- A real idea it gave me: [paste one]
- The ready-to-run prompt it produced: [paste it]
- What I'd improve next: [one line]
```
